tasks.label: Run Spring Boot Backend
tasks.command: export JAVA_HOME="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" && cd dash_bord && ./mvnw spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Frontend (Vite)
tasks.command: cd project-pulse && npm run dev

tasks.label: Start Spring Boot
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 && set PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH% && mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Spring Boot Run
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Maven Compile Check
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw compile 2>&1 | tail -50

tasks.label: Backend Server
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Backend Error Check
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run 2>&1 | grep -A5 -B5 'ERROR\|Exception\|error'

tasks.label: Backend Error Detail
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run -e 2>&1 | grep -E 'ERROR|WARN|Caused by|Exception' | head -30

tasks.label: Backend Full Log
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run 2>&1 | tail -60

tasks.label: Backend Log To File
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run > C:/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/sb_output.txt 2>&1; echo 'DONE exit:$?'

tasks.label: Backend Log Errors
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run > /c/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/full-project/sb_out.txt 2>&1; cat /c/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/full-project/sb_out.txt | grep -v '\[INFO\]' | head -50

tasks.label: Check Port 8080
tasks.command: netstat -ano | grep :8080 | head -5

tasks.label: Restart Backend
tasks.command: taskkill /F /PID 15404 && echo 'Killed' && sleep 2 && cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run > /c/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/full-project/sb_out.txt 2>&1 &

tasks.label: Kill And Restart
tasks.command: cmd /c 'taskkill /F /PID 15404' && sleep 3 && cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run > /c/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/full-project/sb_out.txt 2>&1 &

tasks.label: Kill Port Restart Backend
tasks.command:
kill -9 $(netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | grep ':8080.*LISTEN' | awk '{print $NF}' | head -1) 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run > /c/Users/Lenovo/Desktop/full-project/sb_out.txt 2>&1 &
echo 'Backend starting in background'

tasks.label: Kill Java Process
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "taskkill /F /PID 15404" && echo 'killed'

tasks.label: Spring Backend
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Test Login API
tasks.command: curl -s -w "\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@test.com","password":"admin123"}'

tasks.label: Test Frontend
tasks.command: curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" http://localhost:8081/

tasks.label: Kill Old Backend
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "taskkill /F /PID 16068" && echo killed

tasks.label: Spring Backend
tasks.command: cd dash_bord && JAVA_HOME='/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21' PATH="/c/Program Files/Java/jdk-21/bin:$PATH" ./mvnw spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Test Wrong Password
tasks.command: curl -s -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@test.com","password":"wrongpass"}'
